name: Bannari Amman Institute of Technology
location: Alathukombai - Post, Sathyamangalam - 638 401, Erode District, Tamil Nadu, India

highlights: Top companies: TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Cognizant
Recent placements: Juspay (27 LPA), Swiggy (18 LPA), Applied Materials (12.3 LPA)

academic.classrooms: Modern lecture halls with smart boards

campus_life.hostels: Modern AC rooms, WiFi, 24/7 security, capacity 500+, nutritious meals included
campus_life.sports: Cricket, football, basketball, volleyball, badminton courts, gymnasium
campus_life.medical: On-campus clinic for student and staff health

special_features.honors_program: Advanced courses, research mentorship, industry projects
special_features.certifications: Free AWS, Google Cloud, Microsoft certifications

upcoming_events.name: DST-ANRF Workshop on AI-Enabled Joint Communication and Sensing for Beyond-5G
National Conference on Recent Trends and Technologies in AI and Data Science (NCRTAD 2025)
14th National Conference on Innovations in Information Technology (NCIIT 2025)
National Conference on Innovations Materials for Sustainable Environment and Energy Applications

scholarships.description: SC/ST/OBC/Minority scholarships as per government norms

recent_achievements.title: 1st prize in Audio Hackathon at ADCx India 2025

Second Runner-Up at Janatics Automation Challenge
First Prize at Meshmerize Maze Solving - 29th Techfest IIT Bombay
Runner-Up in 23rd Create the Future Design Contest
recent_achievements.organizer: NASA TechBriefs and SAE Media Group, USA

recent_achievements.title: Second Runner-Up at Indian Army Terrier Cyber Quest 2025

testimonials.name: Padma Shri Sridhar Vembu
testimonials.quote: This is my second visit. I am very inspired by the transformational nature of this institution, paving the way for reinventing technical education in our nation.

testimonials.name: Prof. V. Kamakoti
testimonials.quote: A big eye-opener. This visionary effort can transform the landscape of technical education in India.

testimonials.name: Mr Bhaskar Bhat
testimonials.quote: The visit has opened my eyes to what can be achieved in India with vision and execution excellence.

testimonials.name: Prof. M K Surappa
testimonials.quote: Greatly impressed. This institution will serve as a role model for others.

testimonials.name: Dr A P J Abdul Kalam
testimonials.quote: Delighted to visit BIT. My Greetings!

differentiators.location: Scenic campus on banks of River Bhavani, away from city chaos
differentiators.autonomy: Autonomous institution approved by AICTE, affiliated to Anna University
unique_features: Strong industry partnerships (Oracle, L&T, ABB, Microsoft)
Research collaborations with IIT Madras, IIT Bombay
recognition: Praised by Zoho CEO Sridhar Vembu
Featured in national media (The Hindu, etc.)
